name: agent-builder
description: Standalone plugin companion for designing, evaluating, packaging, and deploying agentic harnesses with repo structure, reusable skills, skill banks, and cross-host contracts

interface.shortDescription: Plugin companion for designing and evaluating agentic harnesses
interface.longDescription: Standalone plugin companion for the Agent Builder app. It provides the cross-LLM skill, research synthesis, reusable templates, Prompt Builder prompt contracts, and an empirical catalog covering architectures, frameworks, memory substrates, lab patterns, local/open-source model agents, repo structure, reusable skill banks, skill chaining, and API/Claude/Codex deployment without requiring the local app.
